description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light natural wood finish. The front features four wide drawers, divided by a central vertical seam, with no visible handles, giving it a minimalist appearance. The top and sides are smooth and flat, matching the wood grain pattern seen throughout the exterior. The back panel is white and has open cutouts, likely for cable management or ventilation, suggesting it could be used as a media console or storage unit. The construction appears sturdy, with a solid base and clean lines, suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies. The overall design is functional and contemporary, blending seamlessly into a variety of urban environments.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with four front drawers and a white back panel featuring open cutouts. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a smooth, uninterrupted wood surface with visible grain.
description_view_1: The front view displays four wide drawers with a central vertical seam and no visible handles, emphasizing a minimalist look.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, mirroring the left with a plain wood surface and subtle grain.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a white panel with two large rectangular cutouts and smaller openings, likely for cable management.
